title: Luisiopsis inconspicua
taxonomy: Luisiopsis inconspicua is a species of flowering plant in the family Phytolaccaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is a member of the order Phytolaccales. The family Phytolaccaceae consists of about 20 genera, including Phytolacca, Rivina, and Securinega. Luisiopsis inconspicua is a part of the genus Luisiopsis, which is a monotypic genus containing only one species. The classification of Luisiopsis inconspicua is still being studied by botanists and taxonomists.
